items.title: Solana Exchange Raydium Hit With $1.34 Million Exploit as DeFi Attacks Grow
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $1.34 million exploit on Raydium highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi protocols, potentially impacting user confidence and liquidity within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana infrastructure firm Helius acquires Light Protocol to expand onchain privacy
items.whyYouShouldCare: Helius's acquisition of Light Protocol enhances on-chain privacy solutions, which could attract more developers and users to the Solana network, boosting overall ecosystem activity.

items.title: ‘No current users affected’ – Raydium responds after $1.34mln exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: Raydium's assurance that no current users were affected by the exploit may help stabilize user trust and maintain liquidity in the platform.
